content_body: We came here for our annual family vacation and had an amazing time! The cabin and views of the mountains were breathtaking! The adults enjoyed drinking coffee on the balcony/porch and the treehouse in the morning, and in the evenings, relaxing and drinking our wine and scotch! The kids (5 ranging from 9 - 14) loved the game room, the creek, and especially the hot tub! We loved the fact that there were TVs in every room—we were able to spend quality time together. TVs in kids' rooms only came on at bedtime. We went tubing, hiking, rafting, went to the river (which was the kids' favorite), saw lots of deer (but no bears). We rode the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway. We spent our last day at Rock City and Ruby Falls, which was about a 2-hour drive, but totally worth it! Ruby Falls was so cool! Oh, and the beds were so comfortable!
title: Amazing Family Vacation
